title: BuildMC-Core
description: This plugin adds basic functionality for SMPs like claims, statuses, etc. to Minecraft, that can be turned on or off.
body:
# 🌍 BuildMC-Core *A powerful and very configurable, core plugin for the BuildMC SMP project. Made for modern Minecraft development, crafted with care for 1.21.*\*
[GitHub](https://github.com/BaggelMC/BuildMC-Core-Plugin) **You can find all documentation here:** https://baggel.de/core/ ## ✨ Features BuildMC-Core provides a solid foundation for any Minecraft project. Designed for the **BuildMC SMP**, it bundles essential features every project might need: - 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Teams & Player Status** Create and manage teams and let players set their status. - 🪂 **Spawn Elytra Boost** Launch yourself from spawn with a built-in Elytra boost system. Rocket usage is blocked to prevent abuse. - **Player Head Drops** Players will drop their head on death. It even shows the players death message when hovering over it. - 🌀 **Toggle The End** Enable or disable the End dimension **dynamically**. No restarts required. Broadcasts the change to all players. - 🧱 **Survival-Friendly Chunk Claiming** A secure, intuitive chunk claim system tied into the teams system. Built for balance and survival fairness. - ⚙️ **Easy Setup** Configure the plugin using `/buildmc` or edit the config files directly. --- ### bStats Here is our [bStats page](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/BuildMC-Core/27021). ![Our bStats player & server graph](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/buildmc-core.svg) ### 📥 Installation Steps 1. **Download the Plugin** 2. **Install it on Your Server** - Place the `.jar` file into your server’s `plugins/` directory. - Start (or restart) your server. 3. **Configure (Optional)** - Run `/buildmc` in-game for setup options. - Or modify the `BuildMC-Core/config.yml` file directly. ---
